### [`.`](index.js)

| Export                         | Description                                                     |
| ------------------------------ | --------------------------------------------------------------- |
| [`tagged`](index.js#L6)        | The whole summary tag is used.                                  |
| [`punctuated`](index.js#L11)   | Only the first sentence appears.                                |
| [`unpunctuated`](index.js#L19) | A description that wraps onto a second line without punctuation |
